_docs: Auto-FreeCF Signup Configuration — See README.md for full docs

_options: 1. Public relay — use the shared https://<tunnel>.trycloudflare.com endpoint (zero setup)
2. Custom API — point to your own mail-adapter instance (deploy guide in mail-adapter/)
3. External — use any temp-mail API that implements /new_address + /parsed_mails
_mail_providers._cli: Run moycf, pick Signup [4], then choose mail provider — or pass --mail-api <url>
